---
title: "Disable symlinks on renv"
author: "Clinton"
format: html
editor: visual
---


- Navigate to the dashboard folder  
- Delete the renv folder with the symlinks (package references in RED)
- Open R  
- On the console: 

```{r}

Sys.setenv(RENV_CACHE_SYMLINKS=FALSE)
renv::restore(rebuild=TRUE)

```

- Follow the prompts (Yes)
